creator: Carpetsmoker@rwxrwxrwx.net
text:
On Wed, 1 Jul 2009 15:28:05 -0300, Sylvio Cesar <scjamorim@bsd.com.br>
wrote:
> Hi Martin,
> 
>      Which version of FreeBSD do you use? I was the last to update the
> port, I am not the maintainer, but knowing the version you're using, I
> will try to install it and check the error you are having.
> 
> Regards,
> 
> Sylvio Cesar.

Hi,

I tested this specific patch on FreeBSD 7 STABLE only, but I had this
problem in the past on FreeBSD 6 too.

Since I took maintainership:

1.3.3.8 worked.
1.3.3.9 and 1.3.3.10 didn't work.
1.3.3.11 worked.
1.3.3.12 and 1.3.13 don't work.

Not sure about earlier versions ...
Happens with both GNU autotools and CMake build systems.

1.3.5 is close to release, I had some good results with 1.3.4 test
builds I did, but that was some time ago.
